---
title: 'Do you want to make a snowman'
date: '2020-12-07T07:29:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Preston Markus Wolfe - Journal'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5477180471849696797'
blogger_filename: '/2020/12/do-you-want-to-make-snowman.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Preston Markus Wolfe - Journal/feed.atom'
---

I haven't written in here much over the years. You're amazing. You impress me every day. I'm sorry I was so distracted after mommy died, I was building myself back up. Trying to breathe.&nbsp;<div><br /></div><div>Today, we started making a snowman out of paper machete like mommy used to do. You had a great idea and it's turning out great.&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>You are warm, giving, fun loving, active. In many ways my own style hinders you from being your best self. I'll try to find ways to help you tap into the parts that make you special!&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>If you believe in yourself, you'll do amazing things. I believe in you. I love you. I trust you. Keep pushing forward.</div><div><br /></div><div>I know it's hard, I often get the "can't wanna" too. But it's worth it.</div><div><br /></div><div>You make me proud. I love you.</div>
